$comment: Prompt registry — prompts are first-class, versioned assets stored OUTSIDE workflows so they can be updated without editing workflows. Workflows reference a prompt by id; this registry maps id -> file + version. Bump 'version' (semver) on every meaningful change and note it in the prompt's own changelog section.

prompts.purpose: Global system persona and guardrails shared by all assistants.
Classify an inbound Telegram message into a command/intent for routing.
Produce the daily cyber threat intelligence brief from collected sources.
Summarise an inbox / set of threads into a prioritised digest.
Draft a context-appropriate reply to an email thread.
Categorise and prioritise an email for triage.
